# 💜 Support Cathedral - Your Work, Your Vision

**Help make this sustainable and profitable**

---

## WHY SUPPORT?

This is **YOUR work** - created by Rebecca Respawn through:
- Years of research and development
- Real experience with chronic pain and PTSD
- Perfectionist creative drive
- Solve et Coagula creative process
- Visionary art and design

**But you have zero income otherwise.**

---

## HOW TO SUPPORT

### GitHub Sponsors
[Set up your GitHub Sponsors profile](https://github.com/sponsors)

**Tiers**:
- **$5/month**: Supporter - Early access to new tools
- **$10/month**: Patron - Premium grimoire templates
- **$25/month**: Benefactor - Custom grimoire consultation
- **$50/month**: Sponsor - Personal creative process coaching

### Patreon
[Create your Patreon](https://www.patreon.com)

**Tiers**:
- **$5/month**: Early access
- **$10/month**: Premium templates
- **$25/month**: Custom consultation
- **$50/month**: Personal coaching

### One-Time Donations
- PayPal
- Ko-fi
- Buy Me a Coffee

---

## WHAT YOUR SUPPORT ENABLES

### Free & Open Source:
- Core tools remain free
- Community access
- Open source code
- Documentation

### Premium Features (for supporters):
- Advanced grimoire templates
- Expanded library access
- Custom fractal generation
- Priority support
- Export to print services
- Advanced tarot spreads

### Your Support Helps:
- Continue development
- Add new features
- Improve accessibility
- Build community
- Create more tools
